_instructions: GENERIC TEMPLATE. (1) For MOVEMENT games: use 'player_group' (group your player node is in). For OTHER games (clicker, puzzle, card): use 'target_node' (name of game state manager). (2) Read your actual project scripts to find numeric properties. (3) Determine bounds by reading code: clamp() calls, max values, screen size, etc. Do not copy-paste. Understand your game first. See examples/ for game-type-specific templates.

invariants.note: Read your project scripts to find numeric properties and realistic bounds
